headline: Can Western Digital Deliver Continued Gross Margin Improvement?
summary: WDC's Q3 FY26 gross margin jumps to 50.5% on higher-capacity drives, pricing and cost controls, with revenues up 45% to $3.3B; Q4 guide: 51%-52%.

raw.headline: Can Western Digital Deliver Continued Gross Margin Improvement?

headline: Sandisk's QLC Stargate Gains Traction: A New Revenue Growth Catalyst?
summary: SNDK's QLC Stargate is set for Q4 FY26 shipments, targeting AI data-center storage demand and adding a new growth path beyond TLC SSDs.

headline: Dell's business strength separate from AI servers was very impressive, says BofA's Wamsi Mohan

headline: Veteran analyst has blunt message on Sandisk stock after massive rally
summary: Shares of Sandisk have been on a massive run this year as investors continue piling into artificial intelligence-related memory and storage names. Sandisk stock is up 591% year to date and closed at $1,641 on May 28, according to Yahoo Finance data. The rally accelerated this week after Micron ...
